author.bio: Full-time open-sourcerer. I make macOS apps, CLI tools, npm packages. Currently into Swift & Node.js. Started @AVA__js & @awesome__re. Follow: @sindre_gh_repos
author.name: Sindre Sorhus

content.text:
New in 🐙 Refined GitHub: 
- Highlights perma-linked comments.
- Adds links to the default branch and to the latest semver release.
- Highlight closing PRs in open issues and PRs.
And more: https://github.com/sindresorhus/refined-github/issues/1137
